signatureAbility.signatureDescription: The most tenacious defenders beat their blocks by sheer force of will. When they enter the zone, their rush move attempts are free.
Pass rushers with this ability pay a reduced stamina cost for each move they attempt
Defenders with this ability do not need to spend stamina on shed attempts during a run play
Defenders with this ability have a chance to receive dominant bull rush wins when their stamina is full. This consumes additional stamina.
Defenders with this ability use faster, more dominant pass rush moves and apply significant QB pressure while rushing from the edge of the defense.
Receivers with this ability catch more consistently while catching passes less than 10 yards from the LoS, inside the numbers
Ballcarriers with this ability will frequently attempt to gain extra yards while being tackled
Receivers with this ability catch more consistently while catching passes less than 10 yards from the LoS, outside the numbers
The most physical coverage defenders prevent catches from happening even when their target has hands on the ball. When they enter the zone, they are nearly guaranteed knockouts.
Players with this ability will recover from the effects of Wear and Tear and fatigue at an increased rate between plays.
Ballcarriers with this ability have an increased chance to break the first tackle attempt on kick returns
Defenders with this ability force more catch knockouts and react quicker in any flat zone coverage, less than 10 yards from the LoS and outside the hash marks.
Passers with this ability have a reduced chance to be impacted by throw penalties caused by defensive pressure while on the run
Passers with this ability have perfect accuracy on all throws inside the numbers (except on high/low throws).
Passers with this ability improve the catching prowess of all tight ends who are open on pass plays.
Defenders with this ability force more catch knockouts and react quicker in any mid-field zone coverage, less than 20 yards from the LoS inside the numbers and 10-20 outside.
Defenders with this ability are highly likely to force catch knockouts against running backs.
Defenders with this ability can make jumping; 180-degree INTs while lurking in a zone in the middle of the field; have a greater INT rate; and don't tire after INTs.
Blockers with this ability will frequently attempt and win impact blocks against linebackers and defensive backs when playing as a lineman or fullback.
Blockers with this ability start every new blocking encounter with built-in resistance
Defenders with this ability have a greater chance of forcing fumbles when landing Perfect Hit Sticks
